title: MemoryBridge Configuration
description: Configuration for the MemPalace to ContextLattice bridge sync process

palaceConfig.title: Palace Configuration
palaceConfig.description: Configuration for a single MemPalace instance

path.title: Palace Path
path.description: Path to the ChromaDB palace directory. Supports ~ for home directory.

collectionName.title: Collection Name
collectionName.description: Name of the ChromaDB collection containing drawers

topicPrefix.title: Topic Prefix
topicPrefix.description: Prefix for topic paths in ContextLattice

wingProjectMap.title: Wing to Project Mapping
wingProjectMap.description: Maps MemPalace wing names to ContextLattice project names

additionalProperties.description: ContextLattice project name for this wing

$schema.title: Schema Reference
$schema.description: URL to this JSON schema file for IDE validation

version.title: Config Version
version.description: Version of the bridge config format

orchestratorUrl.title: Orchestrator URL
orchestratorUrl.description: URL of the ContextLattice orchestrator API

apiKeyEnvVar.title: API Key Environment Variable
apiKeyEnvVar.description: Name of environment variable containing the ContextLattice API key

palacePath.title: Palace Path (Legacy)
palacePath.description: Path to the ChromaDB palace directory. Use 'palaces' array for multi-palace configs (v2.0+). Supports ~ for home directory.

collectionName.title: Collection Name (Legacy)
collectionName.description: Name of the ChromaDB collection. Use 'palaces' array for multi-palace configs (v2.0+)

defaultProjectName.title: Default Project Name
defaultProjectName.description: Default ContextLattice project name for drawers without wing mapping

topicPrefix.title: Topic Prefix (Legacy)
topicPrefix.description: Prefix for topic paths. Use 'palaces' array for multi-palace configs (v2.0+)

wingProjectMap.title: Wing to Project Mapping (Legacy)
wingProjectMap.description: Maps wing names to project names. Use 'palaces' array for multi-palace configs (v2.0+)

palaces.title: Palace Configurations
palaces.description: Array of palace configurations for multi-palace setup (v2.0+)

batchSize.title: Batch Size
batchSize.description: Number of drawers to process per batch

workers.title: Worker Count
workers.description: Number of parallel workers for sync operations

strict.title: Strict Mode
strict.description: Stop on first error during sync
